title: Open Records Request — Georgia AG / Flock Safety Communications

communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Georgia Open Records Act, I hereby request the following records:

All emails, text messages, direct messages, or other written communications between any employee or representative of the Office of the Attorney General and Bob Carter (Vice President, Flock Safety) from March 1, 2026 through April 13, 2026.

All emails, text messages, direct messages, or other written communications between any employee or representative of the Office of the Attorney General and any Flock Safety employee or representative from March 1, 2026 through April 13, 2026.

Any internal communications within the Office of the Attorney General referencing Flock Safety, Bob Carter, or the LinkedIn post published on or about April 11, 2026 from the Attorney General's official LinkedIn account, from April 1, 2026 through April 13, 2026.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 3 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Jason Hunyar
